strengths: Diverse technical expertise across multiple languages and domains (JavaScript/TypeScript, Dlang, Node.js, etc.)
Entrepreneurial experience through GISCollective and freelance work, demonstrating innovation and ownership
Deep focus on software quality and developer tooling (TDD, CI/CD, agentic workflows)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of AI/ML expertise or cloud-native technologies in senior roles
Recent AI-related work (at re:cinq) appears tangential rather than core to job requirements
No advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields despite 15+ years of experience
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and entrepreneurial drive, but lacks clear evidence of specialized AI/cloud expertise required for this role. His background leans more toward general systems programming and tooling rather than AI strategy or platform development, which is critical for this position.
